name: search-google
command: Search for 'opencli github' and extract the titles of the top 3 results

command: Search for 'TypeScript tutorial' and extract the first 3 result titles and URLs

name: search-wiki
command: Search for 'Rust programming language' in the search box, click the result, and extract the first sentence

command: Search for 'react' and extract the name and description of the top 3 packages

command: Search for 'browser automation' and extract the top 3 repository names

name: nav-click-link-example
command: Click the 'More information...' link and extract the heading of the new page

name: nav-click-hn-first
command: Click on the first story link and extract the title of the page you land on

name: nav-click-hn-comments
command: Click on the comments link of the first story and extract the story title from the comments page

name: nav-click-wiki-link
command: Click on the 'History' section link in the table of contents and extract the first sentence of that section

name: nav-click-github-tab
command: Click on the 'Issues' tab and extract the title of the first open issue

name: nav-go-back
command: Click the 'More information...' link, then go back, and extract the heading of the original page

name: nav-multi-step
command: Go to the 'About' page from the footer link, then extract the page title

name: scroll-footer-quotes
command: Scroll to the bottom of the page and extract the text in the footer

name: scroll-footer-books
command: Scroll to the bottom and extract the copyright text

name: scroll-long-page
command: Scroll down and count how many posts are on this page

name: scroll-find-element
command: Scroll down to find the 'Next' pagination link and extract its URL

name: scroll-lazy-load
command: Scroll down to load more content and extract the total number of items visible on the page

name: form-simple-name
command: Fill in the Customer Name field with 'OpenCLI Test' and the Telephone field with '1234567890'. Do not submit.

name: form-text-inputs
command: Fill the Customer Name with 'Alice' and Telephone with '555-1234'. Do not submit.

name: form-radio-select
command: Select the 'Medium' pizza size option. Do not submit.

name: form-checkbox
command: Check the 'Cheese' topping checkbox. Do not submit.

name: form-textarea
command: Type 'This is an automated test by OpenCLI' into the Delivery Instructions textarea. Do not submit.

name: form-login-fake
command: Fill the username field with 'testuser' and the password field with 'testpass'. Do not submit.

name: complex-wiki-toc
command: Extract the table of contents headings from the JavaScript article

name: complex-books-detail
command: Click on the first book, then extract its title, price, and description from the detail page

name: complex-quotes-page2
command: Navigate to page 2 of quotes and extract the first 3 quotes with author

name: complex-github-repo-info
command: Extract the repository language, license, and last commit date

name: complex-hn-story-comments
command: Click the first story, go back, then click the comments link and extract the number of comments

name: complex-multi-extract
command: Extract both the page title AND the first paragraph text
